trust_boundary.reliance_statement: This adapter describes a simulated SIEM/security log evidence shape. SIEM correlations are observations, not authoritative ProofRail decisions.

control_surface.description: Simulated SIEM/security log records correlating actor identity, protected action invocation, and observed decision outcome.

decision_event.description: Simulated SIEM record summarizing a correlated decision observation for a protected action.

bypass_evidence.description: Simulated correlation alert when a protected action is observed outside the controlled path.

revocation_status.limitation: SIEM correlations do not author authoritative revocation status; revocation evidence should come from the authority/gateway/policy source.

subject_hashes.limitation: Security log payloads typically do not include content hashes of decision subjects; the manifest or gateway should supply subject hashes.

source_identity.description: Source identity is the SIEM/correlator identity declared in adapter metadata; this is not a trust decision.

timestamp_integrity.description: SIEM records observation timestamps; v0.2.6 does not verify collector clock trust or log immutability.

normalization_notes: Maps SIEM outcome strings to ProofRail allow/deny-style decision observations.
Maps SIEM correlation reason codes to the normalized reason field unchanged.
Does not assert that the SIEM log is tamper-evident or complete.

adapter_limitations: Static descriptor only; no real SIEM integration.
SIEM correlations are observations, not authoritative decisions.
Does not prove log authenticity, immutability, or completeness.
non_claims: This adapter is not a certification.
This adapter does not make the SIEM a trust authority.
This adapter does not assert that any real SIEM product is conformant.
